steps.title: Turn the data into points
steps.content: The input $t$ is years after 2000. The two points are $(0,4)$ and $(13,1.9)$, where the output is in millions of barrels.

steps.title: Find the rate of change
steps.content: The slope is $$m=\frac{1.9-4}{13-0}=\frac{-2.1}{13}=-\frac{21}{130}$$ The initial value is $4$, so $$f(t)=-\frac{21}{130}t+4$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice C has this negative rate and initial value, so C is correct.
